Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to be performed after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING compared to the average resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in variants that include re-submission loops
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by MISSING after the last approval step (e.g., Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the subsequent Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in rework cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in cases where the process restarts with Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE within the same declaration number
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in variants that do not involve pre-approver roles, compared to variants that do involve Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to occur after the initial submission, specifically in domestic travel reimbursement cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in cases that skip the budget owner approval step
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in processes that end without a Request Payment activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case where activity 'Request Payment does not occur

Name: Time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in university-wide 2018 data versus 2017 departmental data
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time until Declaration REJECTED by MISSING is performed in cases that later result in successful Payment Handled completion
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Payment Handled'
